content: Replaced the 7-level '../../../../../../../.agents/rules/02-pmcro-cycle-discipline.md' chain with '<repo_path>/.agents/rules/02-pmcro-cycle-discipline.md' in the opening prose paragraph.

Left the Usage section's repo_path line reading 'resolved per Law 1, .agents/rules/01-declarative-params.md' unchanged -- it had no '../../' prefix to replace, and per plan step 3 it must match commands/run-cycle.md's own wording verbatim rather than be independently reformatted.

Renamed 'Invocation Contract' heading to 'Usage (System Contract)'. Read commands/run-cycle.md and confirmed its parameter block (domain/true_intent/repo_path, identical field names and identical repo_path wording) already matches this section verbatim -- no drift found, so no field renaming was needed. Added one clarifying sentence stating the two are the same contract by construction and must be kept in sync.

In 'Reference Files', replaced all four '../../references/*.md' entries with full repo-relative paths from repo root (catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/references/*.md). Left the inline '../../references/...' mentions inside steps 1 and 2 of 'The Cycle' section untouched -- out of scope per true_intent; logged as an open note in reflect rather than silently expanded.

Re-read the full file post-edit. Diff against the pre-edit version is limited to exactly: the Law 2 reference, the section rename plus one added sentence, and the four Reference Files paths. No other text altered.
